channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Schema Documentation Provider - Thu Mar 12 09:39:17 UTC 2026
item.description:
Appends @Schema(description) and @Parameter(description) from Swagger/OpenAPI annotations to the Quick Documentation popup.
vendor: Liva Healthcare downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.livalife.schema-doc
